creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry, I am rather confused. Are you trying to get the following card to work?

pcm0@pci0:0:5:0:	class=0x040100 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x8086 device=0x2415 subvendor=0x8086 subdevice=0x0000
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = '82801AA AC'97 Audio Controller'
    class      = multimedia
    subclass   = audio

Also I think it'd be helpful to share the full output of dmesg(8) after a verbose boot.
